_comment: EAS Build + Submit + Update profiles. Reference: https://docs.expo.dev/eas/json/

development._comment: Local dev build with Expo Dev Client — sideload via QR / TestFlight Internal

preview._comment: Internal QA / stakeholder builds — TestFlight + Google Internal Testing. Uses DEV Firebase + staging API.

production._comment: Public store release — paired with EAS Update production channel. Uses PROD Firebase + prod API.

ios._comment: App Store Connect — TODO(Danny): fill appleId + appleTeamId qua `eas credentials`

android._comment: TODO(Danny): place Play Console service-account.json in repo root or use EAS Secret
